case_title: PATRICIA YASMINA MALESPIN VS. ALLIANCE UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALESPIN, PATRICIA YASMINA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
NOTICE OF CHALLENGE TO VENUE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
FILED CHALLENGE TO VENUE. FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLIANCE UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO PLAINTIFF MALESPIN, PATRICIA YASMINA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MALESPIN, PATRICIA YASMINA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLIANCE UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF PATRICIA MALESPIN IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY HER OWN NON COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER, JONATHAN ESCOBAR. CLERK GARY FELICIANO ADMINISTERED THE INTERPRETER'S OATH TO JONATHON ESCOBAR. DEFENDANT ALLIANCE UNITED INSURANCE CO. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MONICA FUENTES, ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT INDICATED DURING PROCEEDING THAT VENUE CHALLENGE SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT WAS ERRONEOUS. VENUE WAS NOT AT ISSUE, RATHER PROPER DEFENDANT. AFTER HEARING TESTIMONY AND REVIEWING EVIDENCE, HONORABLE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN DETERMINED THAT DEFENDANT ALLIANCE UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY IS A PROPER DEFENDANT FOR A SETTLEMENT BREACH OF CONTRACT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, NOT AS AN AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLIANCE UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALESPIN, PATRICIA YASMINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLIANCE UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY $0. FOR THE REASON STATED IN THE ATTACHED FORM MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALESPIN, PATRICIA YASMINA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLIANCE UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-06-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLIANCE UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY
